pitch: Cuts AI inference spend by routing each request to the cheapest model and GPU mix that still meets SLAs.

market.rationale: Production AI spend is growing fast, but AI gateway competition is already dense.

differentiation.rationale: The cost-optimization wedge is clear, though several gateways already offer routing and spend features.

execution.rationale: The plan is specific on pilots, proof points, and unit economics, but enterprise integration risk remains.

timeliness.rationale: Recent AI funding and compute investment news make inference efficiency a strong why-now story.

topRisks: Cloud vendors may bundle similar routing features.
Customers may not trust automated routing decisions without transparent proof.
Integration and security reviews may slow production rollout.
